'''tagogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:lab|lab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lab|lab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tagogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tægegeth|tægegeth]] || [[word:tægegej|tægegej]] || [[word:tægegesh|tægegesh]] || [[word:tægege|tægege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tagogogoth|tagogogoth]] || [[word:tagogogoj|tagogogoj]] || [[word:tagogogosh|tagogogosh]] || [[word:tagogogo|tagogogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tagogoth|tagogoth]] || [[word:tagogoj|tagogoj]] || [[word:tagogosh|tagogosh]] || [[word:tagogo|tagogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tagofgoth|tagofgoth]] || [[word:tagofgoj|tagofgoj]] || [[word:tagofgosh|tagofgosh]] || [[word:tagofgof|tagofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tagogotho|tagogotho]] || [[word:tagogojo|tagogojo]] || [[word:tagogosho|tagogosho]] || [[word:tagogoko|tagogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tagogoth|tagogoth]] || [[word:tagogoj|tagogoj]] || [[word:tagogosh|tagogosh]] || [[word:tagogo|tagogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tagogothol|tagogothol]] || [[word:tagogojol|tagogojol]] || [[word:tagogoshol|tagogoshol]] || [[word:tagogokol|tagogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tagogothotho|tagogothotho]] || [[word:tagogojojo|tagogojojo]] || [[word:tagogoshosho|tagogoshosho]] || [[word:tagogoko|tagogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tagogothon|tagogothon]] || [[word:tagogojon|tagogojon]] || [[word:tagogoshon|tagogoshon]] || [[word:tagogokon|tagogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tagogothoro|tagogothoro]] || [[word:tagogojoro|tagogojoro]] || [[word:tagogoshoro|tagogoshoro]] || [[word:tagogokoro|tagogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
